title: [RFC] how to have regression tests on the quay built images
body:
**Description**

OpenShift pipelines (and I'm sure others) will be downstream users of your https://quay.io/repository/buildah/stable?tab=info builds.
How best should we relay what is expected of this image?
i.e. the path to buildah binary? whether ENTRYPOINT is defined? 

For example, if you document that this image will _not_ set ENTRYPOINT, then downstream can expect to not be broken by it suddenly appearing.

comments.body: I think that is what we decided on,  No Entrypoint, so we should document this.
Weird, no notice from GitHub fro me on this until @rhatdan replied.
I'll add a note to the docs for the noentrypoint bit.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Did you ever work on this?
I'm not sure, I'll run it down today.
I believe this is fixed.  Reopen if I am mistaken.
